properties.name: Tunnel Tiergarten Spreebogen / B96
properties.geometry_status: open-data engineered approximation, not official surveyed as-built geometry
properties.source: Public tunnel portal coordinates, public route description, local OSM tunnel/road context, and DAUB/STUVA cross-section facts; centreline and depth profile extrapolated for visual QA
properties.route_description: Minna-Cauer-Strasse / Invalidenstrasse, under Berlin Hauptbahnhof, under the Spree, past the Bundeskanzleramt / Spreebogen, through the Tiergarten, Kemperplatz / Tiergartenstrasse, then south toward Reichpietschufer outside the visible v0.1 focus area.
properties.depth_status: schematic constant depth for cutaway rendering
properties.render_cues: Draw as a visible under-surface rectangular tunnel volume with casing, floor, side walls, centre wall, warm lighting dots, ventilation / shaft markers and portal markers.
properties.notes: The committed geometry is a first-pass engineered approximation for the isometric model. It is intentionally not labelled as surveyed Amtsgeometrie until an official as-built tunnel GIS/CAD source is found and licensed.
